message.content:
### 1. Overall Layout and Structure  
The image shows a **mobile web interface** (likely viewed in a browser) displaying a Facebook post from "Brightlingsea Taxis." The layout is structured as follows:  
- **Top Bar**: Browser navigation (time: 15:29, battery: 87%, URL: `www.google.com`, back/refresh buttons).  
- **Facebook Post Header**: Brand logo (Facebook), post title ("Brightlingsea Taxis"), timestamp ("0:32"), and action icons (menu, close).  
- **Main Content**: A promotional banner for "Brightlingsea Taxis" (airport transfers) with a taxi image, pricing, and call-to-action.  
- **Post Metadata**: Title ("Brightlingsea Taxis on Reels | Facebook"), upload date ("10 Jan 2026"), description, and action buttons ("Watch," "More," "Share," "Save").  
- **Bottom Navigation**: Facebook’s mobile bottom bar (home, explore, bookmarks, notifications, menu).  


### 2. Color Scheme (Hex Codes)  
The color palette is **high-contrast and brand-focused**, with a mix of dark, bright, and neutral tones:  
- **Backgrounds**:  
  - Browser/Post Background: `#F0F2F5` (light gray, Facebook’s default).  
  - Promotional Banner Background: `#1A1A1A` (near-black, for contrast).  
- **Text Colors**:  
  - Primary Text (e.g., "BRIGHTLINGSEA TAXIS," "AIRPORT TRANSFERS"): `#FFD700` (bright yellow, brand color).  
  - Secondary Text (e.g., "AFFORDABLE - RELIABLE - COMFORTABLE," pricing): `#FFFFFF` (white, for readability on dark backgrounds).  
  - Post Metadata (e.g., "Uploaded: 10 Jan 2026"): `#65676B` (medium gray).  
  - Action Buttons (e.g., "Watch," "Share"): `#1877F2` (Facebook blue, for interactivity).  
- **Accents**:  
  - Taxi Logo/Icon: `#FFD700` (yellow).  
  - "BOOK NOW" Button: `#FFD700` (yellow) with black text.  
  - "More" Dropdown: `#1877F2` (blue) text.  


### 3. Key UI Elements and Components  
- **Browser Navigation**: Standard mobile browser elements (time, battery, URL bar, back/refresh).  
- **Facebook Post Header**:  
  - Brand logo (Facebook "f" icon: `#1877F2`).  
  - Post title ("Brightlingsea Taxis"): `#1C1E21` (dark gray).  
  - Timestamp ("0:32"): `#65676B` (medium gray).  
  - Action icons (menu: three dots, close: "X"): `#65676B`.  
- **Promotional Banner**:  
  - Brand Name ("BRIGHTLINGSEA TAXIS"): Large, bold `#FFD700` text.  
  - Service Title ("AIRPORT TRANSFERS"): White text on dark background.  
  - Pricing List: White text with yellow airport icons (`#FFD700`).  
  - "BOOK NOW" Button: Yellow background (`#FFD700`) with black text.  
  - Contact Number: `#FFD700` text.  
- **Post Metadata**:  
  - Title ("Brightlingsea Taxis on Reels | Facebook"): `#1C1E21` (dark gray).  
  - Upload Date: `#65676B`.  
  - Description: `#65676B`.  
  - "More" Dropdown: Blue text (`#1877F2`).  
- **Action Buttons**:  
  - "Watch": Rounded blue button (`#1877F2`) with white text.  
  - "Share"/"Save": Light gray buttons (`#E9ECEF`) with dark gray icons/text.  
- **Bottom Navigation**: Facebook’s standard icons (home: `#1C1E21`, explore: `#1C1E21`, etc.) on a white background.  


### 4. Typography Style  
- **Brand/Headings**: Bold, sans-serif (likely **Arial Black** or **Helvetica Bold**) for "BRIGHTLINGSEA TAXIS" and "AIRPORT TRANSFERS" (high contrast, large size).  
- **Body Text**: Sans-serif (e.g., **Arial** or **Roboto**) for pricing, descriptions, and metadata (medium size, legible).  
- **Call-to-Action (CTA)**: Bold, sans-serif for "BOOK NOW" (emphasizes action).  
- **Post Metadata**: Regular sans-serif (smaller size, lighter weight) for dates/descriptions.  


### 5. Gradients or Special Effects  
- **Banner Background**: Subtle **dark-to-light gradient** (from `#1A1A1A` to `#2D2D2D`) to add depth, mimicking a nighttime airport scene.  
- **Taxi Image**: Slight **vignette effect** (darkened edges) to focus attention on the taxi and pricing list.  
- **"BOOK NOW" Button**: Flat design (no gradient) with high contrast for visibility.  
- **Icons**: Minimalist, flat design (e.g., airport icons, taxi logo) with solid colors (no gradients).  


### Summary  
The UI prioritizes **brand visibility** (yellow `#FFD700` for "Brightlingsea Taxis") and **readability** (white text on dark backgrounds). The layout is clean and mobile-optimized, with clear CTAs (e.g., "BOOK NOW," "Watch") and standard Facebook UI elements for familiarity. Gradients and effects are subtle, enhancing visual hierarchy without overwhelming the user.
